To Administer The Estate With Full Authority
Off Calendar Dec-24-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES- AARON L. AMERSON, PETITIONER IN PRO PER;

THE COURT QUESTIONED THE ISSUE AS TO WHETHER PERSONS REQUESTING SPECIAL NOTICE HAD RECEIVED A COPY OF THE PETITION. MR. AMERSON SHOWED A COPY OF THE FILING OF THE NOTICE ON DECEMBER 24, 2007. THE COURT THEN CONTINUED TO ADDRESS THE ISSUE ON THE REQUEST THAT NO BOND BE POSTED AND THAT THE PROCEEDS BE PLACED IN A BLOCK ACCOUNT. THE COURT EXPLAINED THAT IT CAN ONLY GRANT LIMITED POWER AND THEN THE COURT COULD ORDER THAT THE PROCEEDS OF THE SALE BE PLACED IN A BLOCK ACCOUNT. THE PETITIONER EXPLAINED TO THE COURT THAT HE WILL BE PAYING THE CREDITOR'S CLAIM WHICH IS ONLY 8% OF THE TOTAL VALUE OF THE ESTATE AND IS SAVING SOME TIME TO HAVE TO GO BACK TO COURT TO GET A HEARING DATE. THE COURT INSTRUCTED MR. AMERSON THAT THE ONLY OPTION IS TO FILE AN AMENDED PETITION WITH FULL AUTHORITY WITHOUT THE NEED OF A BOND AND PUTTING THE PROCEEDS IN A BLOCK ACCOUNT. THE COURT GAVE MR. AMERSON SOME TIME TO DECIDE AND WILL BE CALLED ON THE END OF THE CALENDAR.

ON THE SECOND CALL, MR. AMERSON AGREED TO FILE AN AMENDED PETITION. THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER TO JANUARY 28, 2008 FOR THE AMENDED PETITION. MR. AMERSON TO GET A HEARING DATE OF JAN. 28 FROM THE PROBATE SECREATARY. AMENDED PETITION TO BE FILED BY JANUARY 4, 2008.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Peggy Tsujimoto, CSR #5229 Clerk: Cynthia Herbert. Bailiff: Deputy Lee.

To Administer The Estate With Full Authority
Off Calendar Dec-03-2007 Continued To Dec-24-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (615 Head St., San Francisco, Ca 94132)
Off Calendar Aug-01-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Aaron Amerson, petitioner, Alan Yuen, proposed buyer
The court states the there was no court appointed referee and that the sale could not go forward. The petitioner is to speak with the court examiner to better understand the process of selling real property. The petitioner states that the proposed buyer(Alan Yeun) is willing to waive notice. The court ask Mr. Yeun if he understands the ramifications Of waiving notice and is that his wish. Alan Yeun states he is willing to waive notice. The mater is taken off calendar. The petitioner is properly file petition at a later date.
JUDGE:JOHN DEARMAN, REPORTER:KATY BERSAMIN,CSR #11722, cLERK:LARRISA DOTSON, BALIFF:R.LEE
